value:
v1.12.x patch chain for export/import integrity. Origin: 2026-04-09 review found 7 gaps.

SHIPPED:
- v1.12.1 (2026-04-16): #74 auto-backup project scope, #75 encrypted roundtrip. #75 shipped with a STANDALONE --include-encrypted flag rather than waiting for #78's envelope — envelope can still land additively in .2 without reshaping #75's on-disk format.

PLANNED (v1.12.2, consolidated — .3 folded in):
- #76 CLI data export/import all shape parity
- #77 multi-section import transactionality
- #78 export integrity envelope (version, type, scope, optional sha256)
- #79 validateImportEntries leaf value-type check
- #80 import file size cap

SEQUENCING in v1.12.2: #78 first — #76 needs its version field for the shape transition. Then #77 transactionality, then #79/#80 validators. #75 already shipped standalone; envelope wraps additively, no reshape.

CONVENTION UPDATE: original severity-to-patch-number mapping (HIGH→.1, MEDIUM→.2, LOW→.3) bent when .3 was folded into .2. Don't extract as a project rule yet; this was situational — v1.12.0 felt thin and bundling the remaining MEDIUM+LOW work into a single .2 beats three-patch churn.

AUDIT COMPLETE: if asked to review export/import integrity again, check `gh issue list --milestone v1.12.2` before reading code. The audit is done.
